mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.status, p.created_at AS createdAt, NVL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ), 0) AS averageRating, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS reviewCount FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{productId}
SELECT picture_saved_location FROM product_pictures WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, product_id AS productId, stock, expire_date AS expireDate FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY expire_date ASC, id ASC

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS price, SUM(pc.quantity) AS total_quantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite FROM purchases pc JOIN product_options po ON pc.product_option_id = po.id JOIN products p ON po.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) favorite_stat ON favorite_stat.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.price, pp.picture_saved_location, favorite_stat.product_id ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, p.id ASC FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, deal_stat.sale_price AS salePrice, NVL(deal_stat.discount_rate, 0) AS discountRate, p.view_count AS viewCount, NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) AS totalQuantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) ASC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.id ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
